title: Elliott Plastic 500ml Spray Bottle with adjustable trigger action for misting and full spray modes, Ideal for Home cleaning including windows and creating DIY cleaning solutions
features: SUSTAINABLE: Ditch the shop-bought cleaning liquids which are full of harmful chemicals and make your own sustainable cleaning solutions at home, storing them in this 500ml, ½ Litre spray bottle
DESIGN: Produced to fit comfortably in your hand with an easy-to-use trigger action that can be adjusted from a mist to a more forceful stream
MULTI-USE: This handy spray bottle is prefect for a wide range of tasks from cleaning around the home or for watering plants or spraying clothes while ironing
BPA FREE: This Spray Bottle has been made using BPA Free and non-toxic plastic
ELLIOTT: Has been producing cleaning products for over 70 years and has an extensive range of home cleaning products
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. Laundry Pegs Clothes Lines Wooden Brushes Spray Bottles Dustpan and Brushes Dusters Brooms Wooden Broom Heads Window Squeeges Toilet Brushes and Plungers Next page
